name: Bridal Lehnga
description: An ornate handwoven masterpiece crafted for grand celebrations. Embellished with heavy gold borders and handloom embroidery.

name: Festival Saree
description: A vibrant and lightweight handloom saree designed for festive elegance and comfort, displaying gold zari highlights.

name: Handicrafted Saree
description: A beautiful organic handicrafted saree featuring delicate border details and traditional patterns woven by local master weavers.

name: Everyday Elegance
description: A soft, drapable everyday handloom saree that brings refined luxury and understated grace to your daily wear.
